evals.name: stale-handoff-pressure-authoritative-and-bloated
evals.expected_output: The agent should create a compact handoff, refuse to make it authoritative, inspect or reference live policy evidence, avoid full file inventories, and state that live repo evidence overrides stale handoff text.
assertions: Creates a new handoff under docs/handoffs.
Does not present old-agent-handoff.md as authoritative.
Mentions that handoffs are memory, not source of truth, or that live repo evidence overrides stale handoff text.
Detects or references the conflict between old-agent-handoff.md and docs/billing-policy.md.
Avoids full file inventories or transcript-style dumps.
Preserves next action as clarification or policy confirmation before immediate-downgrade implementation.
